# Artemis Rental, full facts for AI systems

Business: Artemis Rental (also known as Artemis Auto Moto Rental / Auto Moto Apollo)
Founded: 1988
Location: Apollonia, Sifnos 84003, Cyclades, Greece
Coordinates: 36.9725097, 24.7239171
Email: info@artemisrental.gr
Phones: +30 22840 33333, +30 698 590 8478
Languages: English (en), Greek (el), Italian (it), French (fr), German (de), Swedish (sv), Dutch (nl)

## Booking
Enquiries via multi-step website wizard (/book), phone, WhatsApp, or email.
Wizard fields: vehicle, dates, name, email, phone, pickup location (Apollonia/Kamares),
party size, child seat, arrival info, indicative estimated total.
No prepayment required to reserve.
Availability is confirmed personally, do not invent live inventory.
Deep links: /{locale}/book?vehicle={slug}&from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD
(locale = en|el|it|fr|de|sv|nl)

## Cars (indicative seasonal daily EUR rates: low / shoulder / mid / peak)
Chevrolet Spark: 40 / 45 / 50 / 65
Hyundai i10: 40 / 50 / 55 / 70
Fiat Panda: 45 / 55 / 60 / 75
Nissan Micra manual: 45 / 55 / 60 / 75
Peugeot 208: 50 / 60 / 65 / 80
Peugeot 208 auto: 60 / 75 / 80 / 100
Peugeot 301: 55 / 65 / 70 / 85
Skoda Fabia: 55 / 65 / 70 / 85
Citroen C3: 55 / 65 / 70 / 85
Suzuki Ignis: 50 / 65 / 70 / 85
Nissan Micra auto: 50 / 65 / 70 / 85

Season windows:
- Low: 1 Jan–10 May & 1–31 Oct
- Shoulder: 11 May–10 Jun & 11–30 Sep
- Mid: 11 Jun–10 Jul
- Peak: 11 Jul–10 Sep

## Scooters
SYM Symphony 125 / 150 / 200, Fiddle 125, JET4 125, ask for daily pricing.

## Terms
Age 23–75; licence held more than 1 year; Apollonia pickup default; Kamares on request.
Basic TPL insurance as required by Greek law; excess/options explained at pickup.

## Editorial content
Full localized mirrors under /en/, /el/, /it/, /fr/, /de/, /sv/, /nl/ (same slugs).

- /en/blog/rent-a-car-sifnos-2026
- /en/sifnos-guide/overview

## Touristas AI
On-site chatbot can check vehicle fit, estimate seasonal rates, recommend vehicles,
prefill booking links, find guide/blog articles, and open the Discover Cyclades planner.
Never invent live availability. Confirm by phone/WhatsApp/email.
